taxon.author: (Blackwall, 1858)
taxon.distribution: Africa. Introduced to the Caribbeen, South America, St. Helena, Mauritius, Sri Lanka, China, Taiwan, Laos, Philippines, Indonesia, Australia, Pacific Is.

referenceObject.reference: Blackwall, J. (1858a). Descriptions of six newly discovered species and characters of a new genus of Araneida. Annals and Magazine of Natural History (3) 1(6): 426-434. doi: 10.1080/00222935808696953
